diarized_transcript:
[Agent] Thank you for calling Genshin Impact Player Support. How can I help you today?
[Caller] Hi, I changed my phone number and I can't receive verification codes anymore. I need to update the phone on my account.
[Agent] I can help with that. Per our Account Recovery Policy, I need to verify account ownership before updating the phone number. Could you provide your UID?
[Caller] It's 803990456.
[Agent] Thank you. Because your old phone is no longer accessible, I'll verify via the email on file. I'll send a one-time code to the email registered to the account. Can you access it?
[Caller] Yes, that one still works.
[Agent] Sent. Please read the code back.
[Caller] 619047.
[Agent] Verified. Per policy, phone number changes are queued for a 24-hour confirmation window. I'll initiate the change now. You'll receive a confirmation message at the old contact method and at the new one. If you do not cancel within 24 hours, the change takes effect. What's the new phone number?
[Caller] It's 9198765 4401.
[Agent] Let me read that back — 919-8765-4401. Is that correct?
[Caller] Yes, that's right.
[Agent] Queued. You'll receive confirmation notices shortly. Anything else?
[Caller] No, thanks.
[Agent] Thank you for calling. Have a good day.
